name: AdAlta Limited
summary: AdAlta Limited, a clinical stage biotechnology company, discovers and develops protein therapeutics in Australia. The company's lead i-body drug candidate includes AD-214, which is in Phase I clinical trials for the treatment of idiopathic pulmonary fibrosis and other fibrotic diseases. It has a collaborative partnership with GE Healthcare to discover i-bodies against granzyme B for use as a molecular imaging agent. AdAlta Limited was incorporated in 2006 and is based in Bundoora, Australia.
